title: Reference Items Across Several Domains (mixed-lists diagnostic)
purpose: Diagnostic for list-presentation preservation across four list types: bulleted (itemize), numbered (enumerate), two-level nested (itemize within itemize), definition (description). Builds on Sprint 2's bullet-prefixed-paragraph finding for Lost in the Middle by deliberately exercising list types in clean contexts. Source uses topical, leak-free section titles (Inner Planets, Primary Colors, Produce Categories, Programming Language Terms, Glossary) and content-bearing prose that does not announce list structure (no 'the following list' phrasing).

definition.Compiler: A program that translates source code into executable code.
definition.Interpreter: A program that executes source code line by line.
definition.Linker: A program that combines compiled object files into an executable.

structure.glossary_anchor: Section 5 lists all 15 terms in plain prose
